reason: Review actionable diagnostics and failure modes for config and persistence paths.
Review test coverage, build/typecheck expectations, and dependency boundaries.
Review cross-layer consistency between CLI, host runtime, storage plugins, and docs.
Check that implementation reuses existing plugins instead of duplicating persistence logic.
Check that default Guga Home wiring preserves session/replay requirements and non-goals.
Check session lineage, branch/fork, session_info metadata, and sessionDir claims against Pi reference evidence.
Check that memory JSONL remains explicit and governed, with no automatic extraction scope creep.
Check that CLI config/model/workbench semantics remain compatible.
